positive: Minimalist celestial wanderer, featuring a stylized astronaut floating amidst a cluster of geometric nebula formations and glowing constellations. The astronaut has a sleek, retro-futuristic suit with glowing cyan accents and a transparent visor reflecting starlight. Composition is centered and balanced, emphasizing the dynamic contrast between the deep indigo cosmic void and the vibrant, luminous magenta and teal nebulae. Art style should be highly detailed, vector-graphic inspired, yet rendered with a cinematic, ethereal glow, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean silhouettes are critical. Lighting is dramatic rim lighting and internal glow. Rule of thirds composition for the nebula array. High contrast, space opera aesthetic. --ar 1:1
negative: blurry, bokeh, grainy, text, logo, watermark, signature, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, mutated, distorted, noisy, extra limbs, poorly rendered hands
